case_name: Aj Harvey v. Jeffrey Johnson, M.D.

summary.brief: Aj Harvey v. Jeffrey Johnson, M.D.. Medical malpractice case involving surgery orthopaedic.

evidence_index.text: Harvey alleges that Dr. Johnson did not counsel him regarding the specific complications from which he now suffers
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.text: The circuit court granted Dr. Johnson’s motion, and Harvey now appeals.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.text: Dr. Fetto, failed to establish the proper standard of care in the case and was further unable to articulate what action or omission by Dr. Johnson proximately caused Harvey’s injuries.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.text: Summary judgment is appropriate if no genuine issues of material fact exist for trial.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.text: Our supreme court has endorsed the locality rule as to the standard of care in Arkansas.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.text: Dr. C. Lowry Barnes, chair of the Department of Orthopedic Surgery at the University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences, who confirmed that there is no variation in 'the degree of skill and learning ordinarily possessed by orthopedic surgeons' between Benton, Arkansas, and other localities.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. C. Lowry Barnes

evidence_index.text: Because Harvey has failed to offer expert testimony establishing the standard of care in Benton or in a similar locality, it was not erroneous for the circuit court to grant summary judgment.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

initial_state.history_of_present_illness: Patient alleges lack of counseling regarding specific complications from hip-replacement surgery.

focused_exam.system: Examination mentioned but findings not specified

requestables.name: Orthopedic Surgery Consult
requestables.description: Consultation with orthopedic surgeon regarding post-operative complications

timeline_phases.name: Pre-operative Phase
timeline_phases.description: Patient undergoes pre-operative assessment and counseling

decision_points.prompt: What should be included in the pre-operative counseling?

options.clinical_reasoning: Patients should be informed of specific risks and alternatives to make an informed decision.
Lack of specific information may lead to uninformed consent.

actual_action_defendant.description: Defendant did not counsel on specific complications

expected_action_court.description: Specific complications should have been discussed
expected_action_court.standard_of_care_basis: Patients must be informed of specific risks

explanation.why_defendant_wrong: Failure to inform patient of specific complications
explanation.what_should_have_happened: Specific risks and alternatives should have been discussed
explanation.legal_standard_applied: Informed consent requires disclosure of specific risks

key_findings: Failure to establish standard of care for locality
Summary judgment granted due to lack of expert testimony

malpractice_determination.point_of_failure: Failure to establish standard of care

allegations.allegation: Failure to counsel on specific complications

court_findings.finding: Failure to establish standard of care for locality
